summary_en: Interim dividend raised to ¥90/share (from ¥70), final dividend to ¥160/share (from ¥70), totalling ¥250/share for FY3/26. Increase driven by net income exceeding expectations and reaching record levels. Company maintains progressive dividend policy and 50%+ total payout ratio target.
title_en: Notice Regarding Revision (Increase) of Dividend Forecast for FY3/26 (157th fiscal year)
translation_en_brief: Nippon Soda announced a revision to its FY3/26 dividend forecast on 14 May 2026. The interim dividend per share was raised to ¥90 (previously ¥70), and the final dividend per share was raised to ¥160 (previously ¥70), bringing the total annual dividend to ¥250 per share. The increase was driven by the company's consolidated net income exceeding initial expectations and achieving record-high levels. The company maintains a progressive dividend policy with a 50%+ total payout ratio target as its numerical shareholder return objective.
